---
title: "CV"
format: html
---

## 👤 Doç. Dr. Volkan Işık

**Social Policy | Labour Economics | Social Entrepreneurship**

Hacettepe University – Vocational School of Social Sciences  
📧 volkani@hacettepe.edu.tr  

---

## 🎓 Education

- **Post-Doc Research**, Universitat Politècnica de València (Spain)  
  *2024*  
  Social Entrepreneurship Ecosystem – Valencia Case  

- **Ph.D.**, Gazi University  
  Labour Economics and Industrial Relations  
  *2009–2016*

- **M.A.**, Gazi University  
  *2006–2009*

- **B.S.**, Cumhuriyet University  
  *2001–2005*

- **Associate Degree**, Anadolu University (OHS)  
  *2021–2023*

---

## 🏛 Academic Positions

- **Associate Professor**, Hacettepe University *(2019–Present)*  
- **Deputy Manager**, Vocational School *(2022–Present)*  
- **Deputy Manager**, Career Center *(2024–Present)*  
- **Head of Department**, Marketing *(2019–2022)*  

---

## 🌍 Research & Professional Experience

- **Post-Doc Visiting Researcher**  
  INGENIO (CSIC-UPV), Spain *(2024)*  

- **Team Leader**  
  TRB2 Regional Development Project *(2019–2020)*  

- **Senior Expert (EU Projects)**  
  İŞKUR & EU Projects *(2022–2024)*  

- **Trainer & Expert**  
  Labour Law, OHS, Social Dialogue Projects *(2016–2017)*  

---

## 📊 Research Areas

- Labour market dynamics  
- Gender inequality  
- Social entrepreneurship ecosystems  
- Occupational health and safety  
- AI and future of work  

---

## 🧠 Skills

- Academic writing & reporting  
- Impact analysis  
- Training design & delivery  
- SPSS & data analysis  
- Project management  

---

## 🌐 Languages

- Turkish (Native)  
- English (C1–C2)  
- Spanish (A1–A2)  

---

## 📚 Publications

👉 Tüm yayınlar için: [Publications](./publications.html)

---

## 📌 Additional Information

- 18+ years academic experience  
- EU & TÜBİTAK project experience  
- Trainer for trade unions & public institutions  
- Editor: Hacettepe University Journal of Social Sciences
